past_24_hours.description: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
past_24_hours.description_zh: 用 Rust 重写的 Postgres，现已通过 100% 的 Postgres 回归测试

past_24_hours.description: Use claude code and codex for free in the terminal, VSCode extension, and discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
past_24_hours.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展和 Discord 中免费使用 claude code 和 codex，类似 OpenClaw（支持语音）

past_24_hours.description: Fill-in-your-own-data framework for YouTube / short-form video automation: CapCut JSON + ffmpeg tooling + an onboarding questionnaire. Ships with zero private data.
past_24_hours.description_zh: YouTube / 短视频自动化的自定义数据框架：CapCut JSON + ffmpeg 工具 + 入门问卷。不携带任何私人数据。

past_24_hours.description: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 无需登录即可显示 OpenAI Codex 和 Claude Code 的使用统计信息。

past_24_hours.description: Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 无限免费 AI 编程。通过 40+ 提供商将 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline、Copilot、Antigravity 连接到免费的 Claude/GPT/Gemini。自动回退，RTK 减少 40% 令牌，永不触及限制。

past_24_hours.description: A sleek, zero-setup torrent finder and downloader that lives right in your terminal.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 一个简洁、零设置的种子搜索器和下载器，直接运行在终端中。

past_24_hours.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 高性能代码智能 MCP 服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——平均仓库毫秒级。支持 158 种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少 99% 的令牌。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_week.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
past_week.description_zh: 基于 Claude Code 的 AI 驱动求职应用框架。Fork 它，填写你的个人资料，让 Claude 评估工作、定制简历、撰写求职信并为你准备面试。

past_week.description: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.
past_week.description_zh: OpenWiki 是一个 CLI 工具，用于为你的代码库编写和维护代理文档。

past_week.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted,  Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.
past_week.description_zh: 隐私优先的 AI 会议助手，基于 Rust 构建，提供 4 倍速 Parakeet/Whisper 实时转录、说话人分离和 Ollama 摘要。100% 本地处理，无需云端。Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) 是 macOS 和 Windows 上排名第一的自托管开源 AI 会议笔记工具。

past_week.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
past_week.description_zh: OfficeCLI 是首个也是最好的专为 AI 代理读取、编辑和自动化 Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 文件而构建的 Office 套件。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装 Office。

past_week.description: Open-source AI hackers to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_week.description_zh: 开源 AI 黑客工具，用于发现并修复你的应用漏洞。

past_week.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
past_week.description_zh: 让 Claude 能够观看任何视频。/watch 下载、提取帧、转录，并将所有内容交给 Claude。

past_week.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.
past_week.description_zh: 永不停歇的编码。免费 AI 网关：一个端点，160+ 提供商（50+ 免费），连接 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline 和 Copilot 到免费的 Claude/GPT/Gemini。RTK+Caveman 堆叠压缩节省 15-95% 的令牌，智能自动回退，MCP/A2A，多模态 API，桌面/PWA。

past_week.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
past_week.description_zh: 运行在终端中的代理多路复用器。

past_week.description: cut Fable 5 token usage by rendering text context as images
past_week.description_zh: 通过将文本上下文渲染为图像来减少 Fable 5 的令牌使用量。

past_month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
past_month.description_zh: 让你的AI智能体像房间里最懒的高级开发一样思考。最好的代码是你从未写过的代码。

past_month.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
past_month.description_zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和RAG块到达LLM之前进行压缩。减少60-95%的token，答案不变。提供库、代理、MCP服务器。

past_month.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
past_month.description_zh: 给你的AI智能体一双看遍整个互联网的眼睛。读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书——一个CLI，零API费用。

past_month.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_month.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体视频制作系统。12条流水线、52个工具、500+智能体技能。将你的AI编码助手变成完整的视频制作工作室。

past_month.description: LEAKED SYSTEM PROMPTS FOR CHATGPT, CLAUDE, GEMINI, GROK, PERPLEXITY, CURSOR, LOVABLE, REPLIT, AND MORE! - AI SYSTEMS TRANSPARENCY FOR ALL! 👐
past_month.description_zh: 泄露的CHATGPT、CLAUDE、GEMINI、GROK、PERPLEXITY、CURSOR、LOVABLE、REPLIT等系统提示！——AI系统透明化，人人可见！👐

past_month.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_month.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引为持久知识图谱——平均仓库毫秒级完成。支持158种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少99%的token。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_month.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
past_month.description_zh: 一款在Mac上使用轻量级虚拟机创建和运行Linux容器的工具。用Swift编写，针对Apple silicon优化。

past_month.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
macOS video editor built for AI
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
past_month.description_zh: AI智能体技能，可研究Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket和网络上的任何主题，然后综合生成有依据的摘要。

past_year.description_zh: LibreCode - 一个类似 Ollama cursor 的编码/逆向接口

past_year.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
past_year.description_zh: 你自己的个人 AI 助手。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾风格。🦞

past_year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
past_year.description_zh: 一个有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法论。

past_year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
past_year.description_zh: 代理工具性能优化系统。为 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等提供技能、直觉、记忆、安全性和研究优先的开发。

past_year.description: The agent that grows with you
An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
past_year.description_zh: 一个由代理管理的博物馆展品，使用 Rust 和 Gajae-Code / LazyCodex 构建——无需人工干预即可开发和维护。

past_year.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
past_year.description_zh: 一个单一的 CLAUDE.md 文件，用于改进 Claude Code 的行为，源自 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察。

past_year.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
past_year.description_zh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

past_year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
past_year.description_zh: 一个完整的 AI 代理机构触手可及——从前端专家到 Reddit 社区忍者，从奇思妙想注入者到现实检验者。每个代理都是具有个性、流程和经过验证的交付成果的专门专家。

all_time.description_zh: LibreCode - 一个类似 Ollama 光标的编码/逆向接口
